rulings.Case Title: JEFF GRAUMAN VS. ATLAS ELEVATOR COMPANY, A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories, Set Two, To Deft Thyseenkrupp Elevator Corp. And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 13, 2011. Line 1. PLAINTIFF JEFF GRAUMAN'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Plaintiff'S Special Interrogatories, Set Two, as To Deft Thyseenkrupp Elevator Corp., And Request For Sanctions. Continued to 4/18/11 for opposing party to provide courtesy copies of its opposition wiht a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6(b). = (302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MALCOLM MEYERS VS. CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 13, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST DBA MERCY MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FURTHER FACT REGARDING DENIAL OF ACCESS TO DEFENDANT'S SERVICES. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: VATCHE CABAYAN M.D. VS. STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 13, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS MOOT AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND, 3RD, 4TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER TO THE 7TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO PLEAD THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT WITH SPECIFICITY. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE REMAINING CLAIMS. A PARTY CANNOT DEMURRER TO PART OF A CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: VATCHE CABAYAN M.D. VS. STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 13, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND, 3RD, 4TH, 6TH, 9TH AND 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT MAINTAINED ITS BURDEN AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT PRESENT SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO MAINTAIN HIS BURDEN. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO CONDUCT DISCOVERY IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF MUST BRING A PROPERLY NOTICED MOTION FOR THAT REQUEST. SEE ROBERTSON V. RODRIGUEZ (1995) 36 CAL.APP.4TH 347, 357. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: WAIKEAN GOH et al VS. SANDRA YANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 13, 2011, line 4, PLAINTIFFS WAIKEAN GOH AND OLIVIA GOH'S Motion To Amend Complaint. PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE FACT THAT THIS MOTION IS BEING BROUGHT AFTER THE DEFENDANT HAS FILED A MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AND JUST BEFORE TRIAL INDICATES BAD FAITH AND WOULD BE HIGHLY PREJUDICIAL TO THE DEFENDANT. =(302/LMG)
